title: COMFORT — Mama hears, comes in
prompt: Wide shot in @kitchen, warming morning light. @Mama in the CENTER of the doorway, hair tousled in pajamas, takes in the pancake-mess scene with concerned eyes. She crosses straight to the girls and kneels on the floor, one hand on @Eva on the RIGHT, one hand on @Sara on the LEFT. Mama (gentle, no judgment, full warmth): "Oh, my sweethearts. Look at me. It's just pancakes. The floor will wash. Are you OK?" Eva (sniffling into Mama's shoulder): "We wanted... we wanted it to be PERFECT." Mama (whispered, smiling): "Nothing perfect ever made me as happy as you two." Soft warm music swell.
